segments.text: In those days there was no king in Israel: and in those days the tribe of the Danites sought them an inheritance to dwell in; for unto that day all their inheritance had not fallen unto them among the tribes of Israel.
And the children of Dan sent of their family five men from their coasts, men of valour, from Zorah, and from Eshtaol, to spy out the land, and to search it;
who when they came to mount Ephraim, to the house of Micah, they lodged there.
When they were by the house of Micah, they knew the voice of the young man the Levite: and they turned in thither,
Who brought thee hither? and what makest thou in this place? and what hast thou here?
segments.speaker: Danite Spies

segments.text: Thus and thus dealeth Micah with me, and hath hired me, and I am his priest.
segments.speaker: Levite

segments.text: Ask counsel, we pray thee, of God, that we may know whether our way which we go shall be prosperous.
segments.speaker: Danite Spies

segments.text: Go in peace: before the LORD is your way wherein ye go.
segments.speaker: Levite Priest

segments.text: Then the five men departed, and came to Laish, and saw the people that were therein, how they dwelt careless, after the manner of the Zidonians, quiet and secure; and there was no magistrate in the land, that might put them to shame in any thing; and they were far from the Zidonians, and had no business with any man.

footnotes: magistrate: Heb. possessor, or, heir of restraints
heading: The Spies Explore Laish

segments.text: And they came unto their brethren to Zorah and Eshtaol: and their brethren said unto them,
Arise, that we may go up against them: for we have seen the land, and, behold, it is very good: and are ye still? be not slothful to go, and to enter to possess the land.
segments.speaker: Danite Spies

segments.text: When ye go, ye shall come unto a people secure, and to a large land: for God hath given it into your hands; a place where there is no want of any thing that is in the earth.
segments.speaker: Danite Spies

segments.text: And there went from thence of the family of the Danites, out of Zorah and out of Eshtaol, six hundred men appointed with weapons of war.
And the children of Dan set up the graven image: and Jonathan, the son of Gershom, the son of Manasseh, he and his sons were priests to the tribe of Dan until the day of the captivity of the land.
And they set them up Micah's graven image, which he made, all the time that the house of God was in Shiloh.
